title: FA: Player Extension X Better Combat
description: FA: Player Extension Compat is a resource pack that fixes animation conflicts between Fresh Animations (FA: Player Extension) and the PlayerAnimator mod. Must be placed above Fresh Animations in the resource pack list.
body:
### Unofficial ### Compatibility resource pack for FA: Player Extension and PlayerAnimator [![MODRINTH](https://img.shields.io/badge/MODRINTH-pink?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray)](https://modrinth.com/user/Arimo) [![GITHUB](https://img.shields.io/badge/GITHUB-pink?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray)](https://github.com/ArimoV2)
## 📖 About **FA: Player Extension Compat** is an unofficial companion **resource pack** for the **FA: Player Extension** resource pack. It fixes animation conflicts between FA: Player Extension and PlayerAnimator — so your player model looks right no matter what you're doing. > ⚠️ This resource pack is **unofficial** and is **not affiliated with** FreshLX or the FA: Extensions project.
## ✨ Features ▶ **`is_playeranimator_active` EMF variable** — lets FA: Player Extension detect when PlayerAnimator is running an animation, so EMF animations don't conflict with each other. ▶ **Better Combat body tilt fix** — removes the unwanted torso rotation caused by Better Combat's attack adjustment when looking up or down in third person.
## 📦 Required Mods This resource pack **requires** the following mods to be installed: | Mod | Why | |---|---| | [FA: Player Extension Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/fa-player-extension-compat) | Core mod that exposes the EMF variable and applies fixes | | [Entity Model Features (EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) | Provides the animation variable API used by the resource pack | | [Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) | Required dependency of EMF | | [PlayerAnimator (KosmX)](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) | Provides the player animation system this pack bridges | | [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) | Required for the body tilt fix to apply | And the following **resource pack**: | Resource Pack | Why | |---|---| | [Fresh Animations: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) | The pack this compat is built for |
## 🗂️ Pack Load Order Place this pack **above** Fresh Animations: Player Extension in your resource pack list.
## 🔗 Compatibility | Mod | Status | |---|---| | Better Combat | ✅ Supported | | Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks | 🔜 Planned |
Made with 🩵 by ArimoV2
